hero.headline: See It. Stitch It.
hero.subheadline: India's first managed marketplace for custom ethnic wear. Upload your inspiration. 500+ master tailors bid. 100% escrow protected.

start.heading: What would you like to do?
start.subheading: Choose the right path — we'll tailor the experience for you.
start.newOrderDesc: Make a new outfit from scratch
start.alterationDesc: Fix, resize, shorten or repair existing clothes
start.ownFabricDesc: You have fabric ready — tailor stitches to your specs
start.customiseDesc: Add embroidery, artwork, sequins or prints to an existing piece
start.selectCityPrompt: Please select your city above to continue

step1.heading: Show Us What You're Dreaming Of
step1.subheading: Upload photos, videos, or screenshots of any outfit that inspires you.
step1.descriptionLabel: Describe the look you want (optional but recommended)
step1.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. I want a deep red bridal lehenga with heavy gold zari work...

step2.fitHeading: How do you like your clothes to fit?

step4.heading: Review Your Order
